channel.title: Wind Farm on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Wind Farm on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: commandline: A wind farm you can talk to: Building a real-time 3D digital twin on Microsoft Fabric
item.description:
The article describes building a real-time 3D digital twin for a wind farm on Microsoft Fabric by combining geometry, telemetry, and language in one simulation. It emphasizes using the model to spend more time on architectural decisions.

  • Source: Microsoft Command Line Blog
